content: I am a first-year PhD student in Statistics and Machine Learning at the Department of Statistical Science, UCL. My research interests lie at the intersection of statistics, machine learning and economics. The title of my project is Policy search via multi-task Gaussian processes and reinforcement learning, which is kindly sponsored by Just-Eat plc. I am supervised by Petros Dellaportas.
